summary: Verified digital-product content sanitization across all 5 digital product pages (/product/digital-bedtime-chart, /product/digital-sleep-tracker, /product/digital-affirmation-cards, /product/digital-coloring-pages, /product/digital-visual-schedule), regression-checked the physical product page (/product/3), and validated add-to-cart + subtotal for a digital product. All 22 forbidden physical phrases are absent from every digital page; all 6 required digital phrases are present; H4 'Waarom ouders kiezen' card titles are unique across all 5 products; 'Bestand & Specificaties' section replaces 'Technische Specificaties'; 'Alleen de zachtste materialen' section is hidden; price badge reads 'Direct in je inbox' (not '2e knuffel 50%'); promise line reads 'Direct downloaden / Onbeperkt printen / Geen verzendkosten'; trust-badges show 'Direct download / Onbeperkt printen / Veilige betaling / Nederlandse klantenservice'; Product Details show 'Type: Digitale download (PDF)' with Pagina's/Formaat/Taal (no 'undefined' garantie/leeftijd, no 'Zacht pluche'); sticky bottom bar shows 'Direct beschikbaar na betaling / Onbeperkt printen'. Physical page /product/3 still renders all physical content correctly with no digital phrase leakage. Adding a digital product to cart works: subtotal €2,95 shown correctly in cart drawer.

issues: The FAQ accordion on digital product pages still contains physical-product questions: 'Hoe lang gaat de batterij mee?', 'Hoe werken de licht- en muziekfuncties?', 'Kan ik de knuffel wassen?', 'Voor welke leeftijd zijn de Droomvriendjes knuffels geschikt?'. These reference 'batterij', 'licht- en muziekfuncties', and 'knuffel wassen' which are physical-only concepts and not in scope for a PDF download. Not in the explicit forbidden-phrase list, but reads as a copy-paste leak — recommend a digital-specific FAQ block (refund/printing/file format/license-of-use).

design_issues.screen: Cart drawer cross-sell (with only digital product in cart)
issues: When a digital product is the only item in the cart, the '🎁 Voeg toe voor 50% korting!' cross-sell carousel still shows physical knuffels. Minor UX inconsistency — the '2e knuffel 50% korting' promo doesn't logically apply to a digital-only cart.
Pre-existing (not introduced by this iteration): the 'Leeftijd:' and 'Garantie:' rows render with empty values on the physical page. Worth a follow-up but unrelated to digital sanitization.

action_items: Consider authoring a digital-specific FAQ block (questions about printing, file format, refund policy, license/use rights) instead of the shared physical-product FAQ on digital pages.
Consider hiding or replacing the '2e knuffel 50% korting' cross-sell carousel in the cart drawer when only digital items are in the cart.
Pre-existing follow-up: physical product page (/product/3) shows empty values for 'Leeftijd:' and 'Garantie:' rows in the Product Details box.
critical_code_review_comments: ProductPage.jsx is heavily forked via isDigital + digitalContent memo (~lines 87-300) + multiple conditional sections. The file likely exceeds the 700-line guideline; consider extracting DigitalProductView and PhysicalProductView into separate components (or at least a digitalContent.js content map) for maintainability.

FAQ section is rendered unconditionally on the product detail page and still uses physical-product copy on digital pages — recommend gating with isDigital and a digital FAQ array, mirroring the pattern already used for trust badges and specs.

Console shows recurring 'Error fetching products, using fallback: TypeError: Failed to fetch' + 422 responses on initial product load. Page still renders via fallback path, but root cause (Supabase or proxy 422) should be investigated separately — not introduced by this iteration.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on requested content-sanitization checks (5/5 digital pages clean, physical regression intact, cart add-to-cart works)

test_credentials: Not needed — product pages are public.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Digital-product content sanitization is verified across all 5 PDFs as of iteration 28. The only remaining digital-specific copy leak is the FAQ accordion (still physical questions). Cart drawer opens via the main CTA 'Bestel & Download - €X,XX' (not a separate add-to-cart button) and shows subtotal correctly. Console emits a non-blocking 'Error fetching products, using fallback' + 422 errors on initial load — page recovers via fallback so doesn't impact UI flow but should be RCA'd separately. /cart route renders blank — cart UX is exclusively via the right-side drawer, which works.
rca of the issue: n/a — feature verification iteration, no bug to RCA. Findings above are scope-extension recommendations (FAQ copy + cross-sell logic for digital-only carts).
